name: PDFPreview
author: Fabien Bloume, StrangeBee
description: Minimal-attack-surface PDF preview: renders pages as images via poppler (and nothing more).

configurationItems.name: max_pages
configurationItems.description: Maximum number of pages to render as images. Larger values increase processing time and report size.

configurationItems.name: dpi
configurationItems.description: Rendering resolution in DPI. Higher values produce sharper images but larger output. Recommended range: 72-150.
